modules.label: Desktop shell
modules.description: Electron app — local render, GPU scan, auto-update
modules.fixHint: Install the Windows desktop app from GitHub Releases for local GPU render and Setup Hub scan.

modules.label: Director Engine
modules.description: Native prompt studio + job export / local MP4 render

modules.label: Analyzers
modules.description: Audio + image drop — BPM, mood, i2v reference

modules.label: Git
modules.description: Required to clone/update Open-Sora
modules.fixHint: Install Git for Windows — tool installer checks PATH before Open-Sora clone.

modules.label: Node.js
modules.description: Managed Node runtime under userData/addons/nodejs
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons installs managed Node.js LTS.

modules.label: Python runtime
modules.description: Required for local GPU diffusion render
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons installs managed Python 3.11 embed under AppData.

modules.label: Python venv
modules.description: Isolated venv under userData/addons/venv
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons creates managed venv after Python embed.

modules.label: Diffusion pipeline
modules.description: Open-Sora-compatible folder with inference.py + configs
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons clones Open-Sora into managed addons folder.

modules.label: Requirements sync
modules.description: Auto-synced requirements.txt under userData/addons
modules.fixHint: Updated automatically when addons change — merges bundled + Open-Sora deps.

modules.label: Pip dependencies
modules.description: torch, diffusers, transformers in managed venv
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons runs pip install -r managed requirements.txt. On Windows without CUDA/colossalai, enable WSL2 and update the WSL addon instead.

modules.label: Music video sync
modules.description: Librosa beat/onset analysis + clip plan for Paths 1, 3, and 5
modules.fixHint: Install Addons after pip-deps — enables librosa beat sync on desktop.

modules.label: Open-Sora install
modules.description: Managed git clone under userData/addons/open-sora
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons — installs under AppData, not E:\Open-Sora.

modules.label: GPU + graphics
modules.description: VRAM tier, CUDA/Vulkan/DirectML, workflow preflight
modules.fixHint: Optional for export mode. For local render, use an NVIDIA/AMD/Intel discrete GPU and run GPU Workflow preflight.

modules.label: Music video paths
modules.description: Paths A–E — track, paste, manuscript, librosa beat-sync MV

modules.label: Co-Producer LLM
modules.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible API for lyrics/manuscript
modules.fixHint: Add API URL + key in Co-Producer panel (optional — heuristic mode works offline).

modules.label: Style-DNA search
modules.description: MusicBrainz / Spotify reference lookup

modules.label: FFmpeg
modules.description: Concat beat-sync clips and mux reference audio for assembled MV
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons installs managed FFmpeg static build.

modules.label: Model weights
modules.description: Open-Sora 2.0 checkpoints under addons/open-sora/ckpts (linked from models/)
modules.fixHint: Setup Hub → Update all addons links models/ckpts. Download hpcai-tech/Open-Sora-v2 into open-sora/ckpts via Hugging Face CLI, then rescan.

modules.label: WSL2 Linux stack
modules.description: Optional Linux venv + torch inside WSL (shared addons folder)
modules.fixHint:
Enable WSL2, then Setup Hub → Update all addons (torch, colossalai, tensornvme, flash-attn). If native builds fail, run once in WSL:
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y cmake build-essential libaio-dev
Then Update all addons again. flash-attn may still use an inference stub without CUDA nvcc.

modules.label: Cloud video export
modules.description: Copy prompts / JSON to Sora, Runway, Kling — no API bundled
